name: REPUBLIC SERVICES, INC.
business: Republic Services provides environmental services including collection, transfer, recycling, and disposal of waste, as well as environmental solutions for hazardous and non-hazardous materials across the United States and Canada.
sellsTo: Small business complexes and multi-family housing
Large facilities such as hotels, office buildings, manufacturing plants
Municipalities under contracts and exclusive franchises

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we operated more than 180 electric-collection vehicles and had 32 commercial-scale electric charging facilities.
We are engaged in 84 landfill gas-to-energy and other renewable energy projects.

For example, robotics and advanced sorting equipment, such as disk screens, magnets and optical sorters, identify and separate different kinds of paper, metals, plastics and other materials to increase efficiency and maximize our recycling efforts.
Our strategy includes an increasing dependence on technology, including the use of artificial intelligence (AI), in our operations.

We are leveraging technology to digitally connect our customers, drivers, logistics analysts, supervisors and trucks via our 'RISE' dispatch platform and in-cab technology.
Approximately 79% of our residential routes have been converted to automated single-driver trucks.

catalysts.event: Commence operations at Allentown Polymer Center
catalysts.sentence: We plan to commence operations at our Allentown, Pennsylvania Polymer Center in 2027.

catalysts.event: Invest approximately $1 billion in acquisitions in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to invest approximately $1 billion in acquisitions in 2026.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures of $1.96 billion to $2.00 billion in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to receive between $1.96 billion to $2.00 billion of property and equipment, net of proceeds from the sale of property and equipment, in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable US and Canada environmental services market generates approximately $163 billion in annual revenue, comprising $110 billion recycling and waste, $37 billion environmental solutions, and $16 billion sustainability innovation.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the total addressable United States and Canada environmental services market in which we operate generates approximately $163 billion of annual revenue, which includes the $110 billion recycling and waste industry, $37 billion of the broader environmental solutions industry, and $16 billion in sustainability innovation (described below) and emerging waste and recycling technologies.
